summary: WhatsApp link fix verification. Both floating button and contact section WhatsApp links use correct wa.me/919876543210?text= format, open in new tab, and display correct text.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid='contact-whatsapp' is placed on the parent div, not the anchor tag. Selector '[data-testid="contact-whatsapp"]' returns the div (no href). Should be placed on the anchor for direct href access. Minor issue, does not affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp links verified working. Floating btn: data-testid='floating-whatsapp-btn' (anchor). Contact section: data-testid='contact-whatsapp' is on parent div; use '[data-testid="contact-whatsapp"] a' to get anchor.
